data.title: DENARIUS METALS ANNOUNCES DETAILS FOR THE MARCH 31, 2026 INTEREST PAYMENTS ON ITS CONVERTIBLE UNSECURED DEBENTURES
data.description: Today, Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) unveiled the specifics of the upcoming monthly interest payments scheduled for March 31, 2026, relating to its convertible unsecured debentures maturing on October 19, 2029.

data.title: Keurig Dr Pepper Declares Offer for JDE Peet's Unconditional
data.description: On April 1, 2026, a total of 96.22% of shares were tendered as part of a settlement agreement. Keurig Dr Pepper Inc., Kodiak BidCo B.V., and JDE Peet's N.V. issued a joint press release in accordance with specific Dutch regulations.

data.title: Globant to Hold its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on April 28, 2026
data.description: Luxembourg, March 27, 2026 - Globant S.A. (NYSE: GLOB), a digital technology services firm specializing in digital experiences, has disclosed the upcoming Annual General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for April 28, 2026. The company is focused on developing innovative digital solutions and creating engaging digital journeys for its clients.

data.title: Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. Reports 2025 Results
data.description: Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. (Nasdaq: LOAN) based in Great Neck, N.Y., reported a net income of around $5,111,000 for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. This translates to $0.45 per share, considering about 11.4 million weighted-average outstanding common shares. In comparison, the net income for the prior year ending on December 31, 2024, was approximately $5,591,000, or $0.49 per share based on the same number of outstanding common shares. The decrease of approximately $480,000, or 8.6%, in net income was mainly attributed to reduced interest income, partly balanced by decreased interest expenses.

data.title: Oculis Publishes Notifications of Transactions by Persons Discharging Managerial Responsibilities
data.description: On March 27, 2026, in ZUG, Switzerland, a press release indicated the approval of annual equity incentive rewards for a member of the company's executive committee. The granted awards are part of the company's ongoing strategy to provide incentives for key personnel, emphasizing long-term commitment and performance. These incentives aim to align the interests of executives with those of the company and its shareholders, fostering growth and sustainability. The precise details of the incentive package, including the number of equity awards and associated terms, were not disclosed in the statement. This initiative underlines the company's dedication to nurturing talent and maintaining a strong leadership team to drive future success in the industry.

data.title: Real America's Voice en Español Names Julio Gonzalez as President
data.description: In Centennial, Colorado on March 27, 2026, Real America's Voice en Español (RAV en Español) revealed that Julio Gonzalez has been appointed as President of the network. With a background in business, policy, and media, Gonzalez is set to steer the network's expansion with his wealth of experience.

data.title: Diginex Limited Announces Extraordinary General Meeting to Approve Share Capital Increase and Share Consolidation
data.description: In London on March 27, 2026, Diginex Limited (NASDAQ: DGNX), a prominent software provider aiding businesses and governments in managing sustainability, regulatory, and supply chain data, revealed plans for an Extraordinary General Meeting of shareholders (EGM). Scheduled for Monday, April 13, 2026, at 10:00 am EST, the meeting targets shareholders listed by close of business on March 27, 2026.

data.title: Mustang Energy, Allied Strategic Resource finalize plan of arrangement; Allied Shares get CSE conditional approval.
data.description: Recently, it was reported that the global sales of electric vehicles (EVs) have reached a record high of 4.2 million units in 2020, which marks a significant increase of 43% compared to the previous year. This surge in EV adoption is attributed to the growing awareness around climate change and government incentives for sustainable transportation. China led the market with the highest number of EV sales, accounting for 41% of the global total. The European market also experienced substantial growth, with a 137% increase in EV sales. The United States, despite facing challenges, saw a 4% increase in EV sales. This positive trend in EV adoption indicates a shift towards environmentally friendly transportation solutions worldwide.

data.title: Q4 2025 financial report released, showing $1.5B in profits, a 10% increase from last quarter.
data.description: In the latest update, it has been reported that the company's revenue for the third quarter has exceeded expectations, reaching a record high of $10 million. This significant increase of 15% compared to the same period last year has been attributed to strong sales in both domestic and international markets. Additionally, the company's net profit saw a substantial rise of 20%, totaling $2.5 million for the quarter. The CEO expressed enthusiasm about these results and stated that strategic investments and cost-cutting measures have contributed to this successful financial performance. As a result, the company's stock price has also surged by 8% following the announcement.

data.title: Biohacking Beauty Routines Gain Traction as Clients Seek Smarter, Data-Informed Skincare Approaches
data.description: In Great Neck, New York, on March 27, 2026, Laser by Aleya has noted a significant trend where the concept of biohacking, which traditionally focused on fitness and nutrition, is now shaping consumer attitudes towards skincare and aesthetic treatments. The company has observed a rising number of clients showing interest in this evolving approach, indicating a shift in consumer behavior towards a more holistic view of self-care and wellness.

data.title: Delaware First Health and the Centene Foundation Announce Grant Program Open Submission Period
data.description: Through May 25, 2026, community organizations and providers in Delaware have the opportunity to seek funding. Delaware First Health (DFH), a prominent Medicaid managed care organization in Delaware, along with the Centene Foundation, are offering support. The application process is currently open in Newark, with interested parties encouraged to apply.

data.title: Skydream Holds Official Brand Launch in Silicon Valley, Unveiling the Space Camping Travel Trailer to U.S. Dealers and Partners
data.description: On March 23, 2026, Skydream (Skydream Technology California LLC) conducted its official brand launch at Hayes Mansion in San Jose, California. The event brought together dealers, media personnel, and strategic partners to partake in keynote presentations.
